prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.8 kg; Height 160.5 cm; BMI 33.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 246mg/dL; 9 months ago 186mg/dL; 6 months ago 210mg/dL; 3 months ago 226mg/dL; current 206mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.2kg; 9 months ago 85.8kg; 6 months ago 85.1kg; 3 months ago 85.7kg; current 86.8kg), Height (12 months ago 160.5cm; 9 months ago 160.5cm; 6 months ago 160.5cm; 3 months ago 160.5cm; current 160.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 36U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 39U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 671mg/g; 9 months ago 526mg/g; 6 months ago 565mg/g; 3 months ago 871mg/g; current 826mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 111mg/dL; 9 months ago 114mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.21 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
